title: The Last Time We Spoke
content: Olivia often thought about the last conversation she had with Daniel before they lost contact. It had been short, ordinary, and full of unfinished sentences because both believed there would always be another chance to talk. Years later, she unexpectedly found his name while searching through old emails. Instead of wondering what might happen, she decided to write a simple message asking how he was. Daniel replied that very evening. They spent hours catching up on everything life had changed. Olivia realized that the conversation she once believed was their last had quietly become the beginning of a completely new chapter.
